title: Bryan Randall
body: Bryan Jemar Randall (born August 16, 1983) is an American former professional football quarterback. He was signed by the Atlanta Falcons as an undrafted free agent in 2005. He played college football for the Virginia Tech Hokies. Randall was also a member of the Tampa Bay Buccaneers, Pittsburgh Steelers, and Winnipeg Blue Bombers, as well as several indoor football teams. He is currently the quarterbacks coach for the William & Mary Tribe.
